errors.message: [SELF-IMPROVEMENT] FAILED: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'run')
errors.resolution: Fixed engineMap key resolution in runSingleCycle() - SELF-IMPROVEMENT principle now maps to 'selfImprovement' engine key correctly

improvements.details: Engine map was missing proper key handling. Added explicit engineKey resolution with null check before calling engine.run()
Replaced relative path traversals with absolute workspace root for reliability
Persistence engine now validates JSON state file and reports corruption
Efficiency engine now detects git working tree with >10 uncommitted files

improvements.recommendation: Increase to 3-4 cycles/day for better coverage

learnings: Engine key resolution requires explicit mapping for hyphenated/camelCase names
Absolute paths (WORKSPACE_ROOT) more reliable than relative traversals
State file corruption check prevents silent failures
Git status integration enables code hygiene monitoring
